title: Google Cloud Memorystore for Redis Instance
description: A Memorystore for Redis instance resource representing a fully managed Redis deployment on Google Cloud.

name.description: Unique name of the resource in the format projects/{project}/locations/{location}/instances/{instance}.

displayName.description: An arbitrary user-provided name for the instance.

locationId.description: The zone where the instance will be provisioned.

alternativeLocationId.description: The alternative zone for a STANDARD_HA tier instance.

reservedIpRange.description: CIDR range of internal addresses reserved for this instance.

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the exposed Redis endpoint.

port.description: The port number of the exposed Redis endpoint.

state.description: The current state of the instance.

authorizedNetwork.description: The full name of the Google Compute Engine network to which the instance is connected.

connectMode.description: The network connect mode of the Redis instance.

authEnabled.description: Whether AUTH is enabled for the instance.

tier.description: The service tier of the instance.

transitEncryptionMode.description: The TLS mode of the Redis instance.

createTime.description: The creation time of the instance.
